description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, dark wood-finished cabinet with a rich, natural grain pattern. The front face displays two prominent, circular black speaker elements with a marbled texture, each encircled by metallic mounting hardware. The right side reveals protruding cylindrical metal components, likely representing control knobs or input/output jacks, arranged in alignment with the speakers. The rear side is mostly flat with recessed rectangular sections, possibly for ventilation or access panels. The left side mirrors the right but with less pronounced hardware, maintaining the wood grain continuity. The overall design is robust and industrial, blending classic wood aesthetics with modern metallic accents.
description: A robust, dark wood stereo sound system with two marbled black speakers and metallic hardware, blending classic and industrial design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, marbled black speaker elements mounted on a dark wood panel with visible metallic hardware.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the protruding cylindrical metal components and the continuous wood grain finish.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying recessed rectangular sections in the wood, with no visible speakers or hardware.
description_view_3: Left side view with subtle metallic details and uninterrupted wood grain, less hardware than the right side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: No visible control panel; only cylindrical metal components on the right side, possibly knobs or jacks.
